essays.label: At Samsara, we encourage employees to bring their whole selves to work (this includes applicants too!) Feel free to share your preferred name and pronouns (she/her, they/them, he/him, ze/zir etc.).
If you selected 'Other' for where you learned about Samsara, please share additional details.
